title: Nested Conditional Logic Puzzler
scenario: Generate a Python function that takes as input a nested list of logical conditions and returns the result of evaluating the conditions. The conditions are represented as a list of tuples, where each tuple contains a condition and a list of nested conditions. The function should recursively evaluate the conditions and return the result. The prompt should be under 200 characters.
constraints: Return the result of the condition evaluation

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the Python code is syntactically correct.
Check if the recursive algorithm correctly evaluates the conditions.
Check if the code is readable and follows standard Python coding practices.
